title: siparunaceae
intro: The Siparunaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, specifically a group of monocots in the order Laurales. It is a small and relatively little-known family of plants, comprising about 100 species that are primarily found in tropical regions of Central and South America. The Siparunaceae family is characterized by its unique combination of leaf and flower morphology, with most species having simple leaves and small, often white or yellowish flowers. Further research and classification may be necessary to fully understand the diversity and distribution of this family.
